sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n94883" key="skinda/rion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκινδάριον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, an unknown fish, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0405.tlg001:27" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anaxandr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">27</biblScope> </bibl> (anap.).</entryFree>
